claim_boundary: This protocol evaluates public-expression matching and prospective self/third-party recognition tasks. It does not prove destiny or metaphysical causality.

public_figure_forced_choice.description: For each public figure, generate a birth-date-only weighted expression signature, hide the true identity, and pick the best matching public evidence profile among one true case plus distractors.

prospective_prediction.rule: Predictions must be locked before the evaluated period, and outcomes must be coded from evidence produced after the lock date.

anti_leakage_rules: Do not use public figure name, occupation, biography, or source_url to generate the Mayan report.
Do not edit interpretation rules after inspecting holdout answers and then reuse the same holdout as proof.
Use train/dev for product tuning; holdout is for final reporting only.
Prospective predictions are not successes until future evidence is collected and scored after the lock date.
Report failed or below-target runs instead of deleting them.
